title: Tibanna Gas Collection Droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Tibanna}}
[[File:Gascollectiondroid.jpg|thumb|right|Gas collection droids in action]]

The '''Tibanna Gas Collection Droid''' was a [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] to steal [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] gas platform on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
These [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were very basic models not unlike [[CLL-8 binary load lifter|binary load lifters]]; they were only capable of limited communication and could do little more than collect gas from one storage tank and place it in another. They were powered by [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]] that allowed them to move swiftly, floating about a meter from the floor.

==History==
[[Tyber Zann]], [[Urai Fen]], and [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]] landed on Bespin with five such droids in order to steal the gas. Fen and IG-88, along with elements of the Consortium's military forces, escorted the droids to the gas collection facilities, each surrounded by four refineries where the droids collected the gas. Once all the gas they needed was secure, the Consortium fled the planet with a large collection of Tibanna gas but not before Imperial reinforcements, led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself, arrived in a failed attempt to stop them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
